# pangolin_idps (Data Source)

Retrieves the list of Identity Providers configured in the system.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "pangolin_idps" "all" {}

output "idp_names" {
  value = [for idp in data.pangolin_idps.all.idps : idp.name]
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Read-Only

- `idps` (Attributes List) List of IDPs. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--idps))

<a id="nestedatt--idps"></a>
### Nested Schema for `idps`

Read-Only:

- `auto_provision` (Boolean) Whether users are auto-provisioned on first login.
- `id` (Number) The numeric IDP ID.
- `name` (String) The IDP display name.
- `type` (String) The IDP type (e.g. `oidc`).
